ItacPersonItem.Notes: Prior of Santa Maria in Via Lata in Rome and `familiare` of Cardinals Alessandro (d. 1581) and Francesco Sforza (d. 1624). See BL manuscript catalogue for the information above.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
